{"problem_standardized_math":"Formula (8.30) gives the gradient operation for scalar division, namely if \\(z \\leftarrow w/y\\), then \\(D_p z \\leftarrow \\frac{1}{y} D_p w - \\frac{w}{y^2} D_p y\\). Derive analogous formulae for the gradient operations corresponding to the following mappings: \\((s,t) \\mapsto s+t\\) (addition), \\(t \\mapsto e^t\\) (exponentiation), \\(t \\mapsto \\tan t\\) (tangent), and \\((s,t) \\mapsto s^t\\)."}
